body_preview: - Day 141 (16:58) assessment phase: exit_code=0, no provider error, but assessment.md was not written (see session_plan/assessment_missing.md). - Trajectory shows task_obsolete_count=1 — the planner selected a task that was already completed, indicating the seed task picker doesn't cross-reference against recently landed work. - Day 141 (11:03) session: 1/2
expected_evidence: Next session with missing assessment produces a task_01.md with trajectory gnomes in Evidence. Future trajectory: task_obsolete_count decreases (fewer stale tasks selected). Implementation Notes: In preseed_session_plan.py, the `choose_task` function or the harness seed path should pull from available trajectory data when assessment.md is absent. The traject
title: Improve fallback planning when assessment is missing — surface trajectory gnomes in seed tasks
